tree.name: Caleb Houstan
tree.narrative: **Caleb Houstan** is an undrafted find — the Michigan wing signed an Exhibit 10 deal in August 2025, earned a two-way contract, then got converted to a full roster spot by February 2026.
tree.note: Michigan wing, floor-spacing shooter. Signed to Exhibit 10 contract Aug 19, 2025, then two-way Oct 18, 2025, converted to regular contract Feb 19, 2026.
